targets.rawSql: SELECT id, trade_date, direction, wing_width, center_strike, entry_price, entry_time, exit_price, exit_time, exit_reason, pnl * 100 AS pnl_dollars, status, metadata->>'feed_instance' AS feed_instance, metadata->>'feed_sequence' AS feed_sequence, metadata->>'config_hash' AS config_hash, metadata->>'git_sha' AS git_sha FROM butterfly_trades ORDER BY entry_time DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT ts, event_type, data FROM decision_log WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT ts AS time, mark, symbol AS metric FROM monitoring_leg_quotes WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
